@Component
export struct CardGuideSection {
  onGoCardPack: () => void = () => {
  };

  build() {
    Column({ space: 12 }) {
      Text($r('app.string.card_pack_section_title'))
        .fontSize(18)
        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
        .fontColor($r('app.color.wallet_text_primary'))
        .width('100%')

      Text($r('app.string.card_guide_subtitle'))
        .fontSize(14)
        .fontColor($r('app.color.wallet_text_secondary'))
        .width('100%')

      Image($r('app.media.ill_card_pack_guide'))
        .width('100%')
        .height($r('app.float.guide_banner_height'))
        .objectFit(ImageFit.Contain)
        .borderRadius(16)
        .onClick(() => {
          this.onGoCardPack();
        })

      Button($r('app.string.add_manage_cards'), { type: ButtonType.Capsule })
        .width('100%')
        .id('add_manage_cards_btn')
        .fontColor($r('app.color.brand_primary'))
        .backgroundColor($r('app.color.wallet_button_tonal_bg'))
        .onClick(() => {
          this.onGoCardPack();
        })
    }
    .width('100%')
    .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
  }
}
